import React from "react"; function About() { return ( <>

About Me

I have done my Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (BCS) from Savitribai Phule Pune University and a Full Stack Web Development (MERN Stack) certification. I have hands-on experience building responsive and scalable web applications.

My technical skills include React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Git, and GitHub, with a focus on frontend development, backend development, REST APIs, and database management.

Currently working in Digital Marketing at SSIC – Your Packaging Partner, I bring strong communication, analytical, and teamwork skills that support my technical role.

I am actively seeking entry-level / fresher opportunities as a MERN Stack Developer or Junior Web Developer to grow and contribute to real-world projects.

); } export default About;
